headline: PMI U.S. Expands Support for Military Families with $260,000 in New Donations During Military Appreciation Month
summary: Philip Morris International's U.S. businesses (PMI U.S.) today announced new contributions that will expand mental health access, peer support, and wellness resources for thousands of military caregivers, bereaved military families, and spouses nationwide. Timed with Military Appreciation Month—which incorporates Military Caregiver Month (May) and Military Spouse Appreciation Day (May 8)—the additional $260,000 in donations strengthens the business's long-term partnerships with three leading mil
